name: Bradbury — The Creatures That Time Forgot
text: Sim ran full into his arms. She was older than he, but she held him with a fierce strength. Chion stood grinning, his teeth white in the sun. Lyte came running, Dienc behind her. They would live only eight days instead of eight years.
